problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
